svg.text: ECO-SIM: Ant × EFN - Mutualistic Defense Clock
Predatory ants patrolling Extrafloral Nectaries during leaf flush |

g.text: EFN secretion peaks at leaf flush, not yearly.
Sugary rewards recruit ants facing herbivory.
Defense is conditional: EFN output and patrol
is whether outbreaks are repelled or escape.
Plant benefit = tissue saved, not ants alone.
Cyan halos = defense events at the leaf stage.
Leaf tissue lost when defense fails: 0
